summary: Bug fix VERIFIED: Sales Order Payment Recording now correctly updates bank account balance, creates journal entries (REC- prefix), and updates Chart of Accounts. All 10 backend tests passed (100%), and full frontend E2E flow tested successfully.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions being -1 (cosmetic, non-blocking)

bug_verification.original_issue: Bank account balance NOT increasing when recording payment for Sales Orders
journal_entries_created: REC- prefix entries created for payment receipts

backend_api: test_get_bank_accounts - Bank accounts API returns accounts with current_balance
test_get_specific_bank_account - Fetching specific bank account by ID works
test_chart_of_accounts_has_ar - Chart of Accounts includes AR (1300) and Cash (1100)
test_sales_orders_list - Sales orders API returns list of orders
test_record_payment_increases_bank_balance - CRITICAL: Bank balance increases after payment
test_journal_entry_created_for_payment - REC- journal entries created for payments
test_payment_modal_shows_bank_accounts - Bank accounts available for payment dropdown
test_complete_payment_flow - Full E2E payment flow works
frontend_ui: Login page loads and login works
Sales Orders page shows orders with status badges
Create Sales Order dialog with customer/product selection
Record Payment dialog shows 'Payment Received To' dropdown with bank accounts
Bank Accounts page shows total balance and individual accounts
Chart of Accounts displays all account categories with balances
General Ledger shows journal entries with SALE-, COGS-, REC- prefixes

seed_data_creation: Created test order SO-20260218-ED37 for LKR 65,000 to verify payment flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment bug fix verified. When recording payment for sales orders: 1) Bank account balance increases correctly, 2) Journal entry with REC- prefix is created (Debit Cash, Credit AR), 3) Chart of Accounts balances update. The fix was in create_payment function which now properly updates bank_accounts collection and creates journal entries. All existing orders have been paid.

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are fully functional with real MongoDB persistence

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Missing Chart of Accounts entries (specifically Accounts Receivable code 1300) and incomplete journal entry creation logic in create_payment function
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: 1) Seeded missing accounts for existing company, 2) Added auto-creation logic in create_payment to create required accounts if missing, 3) Added bank_accounts.update_one to increase balance
reproduction_steps: 3. Create or select an unpaid order
5. Select bank account and submit payment
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Auto-creation of required accounts ensures the fix works even for companies missing default chart of accounts
